sections_cited: Section 114 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1316 of 2017 CP D 1274 of 2017 CP D 1317 of 2017 CP D 1661 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.6850/2017 2. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Yousuf Ali advocate files Vakalatnamas in CP D 1316, 1274, 1317 & 1661 of 2017, on behalf of the petitioner which are taken on record. Learned counsel states that these petitions impugn notice issued under Section 114 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001, however, same shall be contested by the petitioner before the issuing authority. Learned counsel for the respondent states that notices be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the respective petitioners, however, in the meanwhile no coercive action be taken against there against. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
